articles.author: Megan Ellis
articles.title: I tried switching from Gmail to Proton Mail for a week — and my inbox was a disaster
articles.description: You can now transfer your Gmail address to Proton Mail — but should you? I tried it for a week, and it was a total mess.
articles.content: While Gmail is the dominant email service around the world, that doesnt mean it doesnt have flaws. Gmail has long been criticized for its lack of privacy and for including ads. More recently, the int… [+7064 chars]

articles.author: Etiido Uko
articles.title: China’s Loongson launches homegrown 16-core server CPU built on LoongArch architecture — 40W chip with DDR4 ECC and 32 PCIe lanes targets cheap SMB file, database, and web servers
articles.description: Loongson has announced the 3C3000, a 16-core LoongArch server CPU with DDR4 ECC, 32 PCIe lanes, 40W typical power, and performance claimed to match the earlier 3C5000.
articles.content: Loongson Technology has announced the Loongson 3C3000, a new 16-core server processor aimed at low-cost general-purpose server systems. Unveiled on June 26, 2026, via a public corporate release, the … [+3188 chars]
